ai.title: Metafoodx to Showcase Award-Winning AI Kitchen Intelligence Platform at the 2026 National Restaurant Association Show
ai.description: SAN JOSÉ, Calif., April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Metafoodx, an AI-powered kitchen intelligence platform for commercial foodservice operations, will showcase its award-winning 3D AI food tracking and analytics technology at the 2026 National Restaurant Association Show in Chicago. The show draws more than 52,000 foodservice professionals and 2,000 exhibiting organizations across 900+ product categories, offering a premier platform for Metafoodx to provide customers and industry leaders with an exclusive look at its breakthrough technology transforming kitchen efficiency and sustainability.

ai.title: John Ternus Named Next CEO of Apple: A New Era Begins
ai.description: Apple has appointed John Ternus as its new CEO, succeeding Tim Cook. Ternus, a long-serving Apple executive, has been pivotal in pioneering some of the company's notable hardware developments. His leadership will guide Apple through industry transformations driven by artificial intelligence as he takes the helm on September 1.
